record.text: For Luc and Lay essays, follow the style of the-repository-forgot: first-person motivation, concrete frustration, then technical design as the answer. Luc narrative: experiment with minimal harnesses after learning about PI and frustration with Claude Code sluggishness. Lay narrative: being lost across too many meetings and needing private notes, review, and a meeting-aware assistant.
